case_title: SHAO YU KE VS. PREETI CHADHA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY KE, SHAO YU AS TO DEFENDANT CHADHA, PREETI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KE, SHAO YU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHADHA, PREETI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---VIVIAN CHOY. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES -NONE- SERVED JUL-26-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHADHA, PREETI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2014 - JUDGMENT.
